name: Lili Stoyanova
intro: Senior Salesforce Developer focused on building clean, reliable, and efficient systems. I approach problems pragmatically—prioritizing clarity, performance, and long-term maintainability over quick fixes. I enjoy turning complex requirements into simple, well-structured solutions that deliver real business value. My work centers on creating high-impact digital products that are both technically solid and easy to evolve.
